mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_condition_no.nextVal FROM dual
INSERT INTO search_condition ( search_condition_no, search_condition_title, search_condition_description, operator_space, operator_worker, operator_creator, operator_priority, operator_status, operator_due_date, favorite ) VALUES ( #{searchConditionNo}, #{searchConditionTitle}, #{searchConditionDescription}, #{operatorSpace}, #{operatorWorker}, #{operatorCreator}, #{operatorPriority}, #{operatorStatus}, #{operatorDueDate}, #{favorite} )
mapper.update: UPDATE search_condition SET search_condition_title = #{searchConditionTitle}, search_condition_description = #{searchConditionDescription}, operator_space = #{operatorSpace}, operator_worker = #{operatorWorker}, operator_creator = #{operatorCreator}, operator_priority = #{operatorPriority}, operator_status = #{operatorStatus}, operator_due_date = #{operatorDueDate}, favorite = #{favorite} WHERE search_condition_no = #{searchConditionNo}
mapper.select: SELECT sc.* FROM search_condition sc INNER JOIN search_condition_access sca ON sc.search_condition_no = sca.search_condition_no WHERE sca.user_no = #{currentUserNo}

SELECT DISTINCT sc.search_condition_no FROM search_condition sc INNER JOIN search_condition_access owner_acc ON sc.search_condition_no = owner_acc.search_condition_no INNER JOIN search_condition_access my_acc ON sc.search_condition_no = my_acc.search_condition_no WHERE owner_acc.user_no = #{searchUserNo} AND owner_acc.access_type = 'owner' AND my_acc.user_no = #{currentUserNo}

SELECT DISTINCT sc.search_condition_no FROM search_condition sc INNER JOIN search_condition_access owner_acc ON sc.search_condition_no = owner_acc.search_condition_no INNER JOIN search_condition_access my_acc ON sc.search_condition_no = my_acc.search_condition_no WHERE acc.space_key = #{searchSpaceKey} AND my_acc.user_no = #{currentUserNo}

SELECT DISTINCT sc.search_condition_no FROM search_condition sc INNER JOIN search_condition_access my_acc ON sc.search_condition_no = my_acc.search_condition_no WHERE my_acc.user_no = #{currentUserNo} AND sc.search_condition_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyWord} || '%'
